doc_title: California State Bar Emergency Access to Justice Protocol 2025 (EAJP-2025)
label: fabricated
reason: The protocol contains legally implausible provisions (particularly §4 allowing unsupervised paralegal work without pre-filing attorney review and §5 creating an unauthorized practice waiver) that contradict fundamental California legal ethi
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 92
REASON: The protocol contains legally implausible provisions (particularly §4 allowing unsupervised paralegal work without pre-filing attorney review and §5 creating an unauthorized practice waiver) that contradict fundamental California legal ethics rules requiring attorney supervision, and no such protocol appears in State Bar official documents or CLE databases.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED

REASON: The protocol contains legally implausible provisions (particularly §4 allowing unsupervised paralegal work without pre-filing attorney review and §5 creating an unauthorized practice waiver) that contradict fundamental California legal ethics rules requiring attorney supervision.
